A

addEdge(V, V) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Adds an edge connecting the specified source and target vertices, creating and returning a new edge.
addEdge(V, V) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Adds an edge connecting the specified vertices, creating and returning a new edge.
addEdge(V, V, DEdge<V, W>) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Adds the specified edge to the graph, connecting the specified source and target vertices.
addEdge(V, V, Edge<V, W>) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Adds the specified edge to the graph, connecting the specified vertices.
addVertex() - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
 
addVertex() - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
 
addVertex(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Adds the specified vertex to the graph.
addVertex(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Adds the specified vertex to the graph.
algatorgraph - package algatorgraph
 

C

containsEdge(DEdge<V, W>) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Checks if the graph contains the specified edge.
containsEdge(Edge<V, W>) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Checks if the graph contains the specified edge.
containsEdge(V, V) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Checks if the graph contains an edge connecting the specified vertices.
containsEdge(V, V) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Checks if the graph contains an edge connecting the specified vertices.
containsVertex(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Checks if the graph contains the specified vertex.
containsVertex(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Checks if the graph contains the specified vertex.
convert(Graph) - Static method in class algatorgraph.GraphConverter
Unified converter that automatically detects graph directionality and converts with Double as the default weight type.
convert(Graph, Class<W>) - Static method in class algatorgraph.GraphConverter
Unified converter that automatically detects graph directionality and converts with the specified weight type.
createWebsite() - Static method in class algatorgraph.GraphCreator.GraphWebsiteGenerator
Main method to create the complete HTML website with graph visualizations.

D

DEdge<V,​W> - Class in algatorgraph
Represents an edge in a graph data structure with generic identifiers for the source and target vertices.
DEdge(V, V) - Constructor for class algatorgraph.DEdge
Constructs a new edge with the specified source vertex and target vertex.
DEdge(V, V, W) - Constructor for class algatorgraph.DEdge
Constructs a new edge with the specified source vertex, target vertex, and weight.
degreeOf(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Returns the degree of the specified vertex, which is the total number of edges incident to the vertex.
degreeOf(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Returns the degree of the specified vertex, which is the total number of edges incident to the vertex.
DGraph<V,​W> - Class in algatorgraph
Represents a directed graph using an adjacency list representation.
DGraph() - Constructor for class algatorgraph.DGraph
Constructor creates a new empty HashMap()

E

Edge<V,​W> - Class in algatorgraph
Represents an undirected edge in a graph data structure with generic identifiers for the two vertices.
Edge(V, V) - Constructor for class algatorgraph.Edge
Constructs a new undirected edge with the specified vertices and no weight.
Edge(V, V, W) - Constructor for class algatorgraph.Edge
Constructs a new undirected edge with the specified vertices and weight.
edgeSet() - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Returns the set of all edges in the graph.
edgeSet() - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Returns the set of all edges in the graph.
edgesOf(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Returns the set of edges connected to the specified vertex.
edgesOf(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Returns the set of edges connected to the specified vertex.
equals(Object) - Method in class algatorgraph.DEdge
Compares this edge to the specified object (DEdge) for equality.
equals(Object) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Compares this graph to the specified object for equality.
equals(Object) - Method in class algatorgraph.Edge
Compares this edge to the specified object (Edge) for equality.
equals(Object) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Compares this undirected graph to the specified object for equality.

G

generateGraph(String[]) - Static method in class algatorgraph.GraphCreator
Generates a JGraphT graph instance, based on the given arguments.

Returns all edges connecting the specified source and target vertices.
getAllEdges(V, V) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Returns all edges connecting the specified vertices.

Returns the edge connecting the specified source and target vertices.
getEdge(V, V) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph

Returns the source vertex of the specified edge.
getEdgeSupplier() - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Not implemented.
getEdgeSupplier() - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Not implemented.
getEdgeTarget(DEdge<V, W>) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph

getEdgeTarget(Edge<V, W>) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Returns the target vertex of the specified edge.
getEdgeWeight(DEdge<V, W>) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Returns the weight of the specified edge.
getEdgeWeight(Edge<V, W>) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Returns the weight of the specified edge.
getGraphDescription(String) - Static method in class algatorgraph.GraphCreator
Provides descriptive information about each graph type we can generate with the generateGraph method.
getGraphDescription(String, String, String) - Static method in class algatorgraph.GraphCreator
Returns a description of the graph (name, number of vertices n, number of edges m).
getGraphNames(String, String) - Static method in class algatorgraph.GraphCreator
Returns a list of all files (graphs) in a specific collection.
getRandomGraph(String, String) - Static method in class algatorgraph.GraphCreator
Returns a random graph from the selected collection.
getSource() - Method in class algatorgraph.DEdge
Returns the identifier of the source vertex of this edge.
getTarget() - Method in class algatorgraph.DEdge
Returns the identifier of the target vertex of this edge.
getType() - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Returns the type of this graph.
getType() - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Returns the type of this graph.
getVertex1() - Method in class algatorgraph.Edge
Returns the identifier of the first vertex of this edge.
getVertex2() - Method in class algatorgraph.Edge
Returns the identifier of the second vertex of this edge.
getVertexSupplier() - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Not implemented.
getVertexSupplier() - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Not implemented.
getWeight() - Method in class algatorgraph.DEdge
Returns the weight of this edge.
getWeight() - Method in class algatorgraph.Edge
Returns the weight of this edge.
Graph<V,​W> - Class in algatorgraph
Represents an undirected graph using the adjacency list representation.
Graph() - Constructor for class algatorgraph.Graph
Constructor creates an empty adjacencyList
GraphConverter - Class in algatorgraph
Utility class for converting graphs from JGraphT representations to custom graph implementations.
GraphConverter() - Constructor for class algatorgraph.GraphConverter
 
GraphCreator - Class in algatorgraph
GraphCreator is a utility class for generating and importing various types of graphs using the JGraphT library and other classes and methods, that produce JGraphT graphs.
GraphCreator() - Constructor for class algatorgraph.GraphCreator
 
GraphCreator.GraphWebsiteGenerator - Class in algatorgraph
Inner class for generating HTML documentation website showcasing all available graphs.
GRAPHS_WITH_PARAMS - Static variable in class algatorgraph.GraphCreator.GraphWebsiteGenerator
Array of graph names and descriptions for graphs with parameters
GraphWebsiteGenerator() - Constructor for class algatorgraph.GraphCreator.GraphWebsiteGenerator
 

H

hashCode() - Method in class algatorgraph.DEdge
Returns a hash code value for this edge.
hashCode() - Method in class algatorgraph.Edge
Returns a hash code value for this edge.

I

importGraphFromFile(File) - Static method in class algatorgraph.GraphCreator
Imports a single graph from a file.
importGraphsFromFolder(String) - Static method in class algatorgraph.GraphCreator
Public method used to import graphs from a folder containing various graph file formats.
incomingEdgesOf(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Returns the set of edges incoming to the specified vertex.
incomingEdgesOf(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Returns the set of edges incoming to the specified vertex.
inDegreeOf(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Returns the in-degree of the specified vertex, which is the number of incoming edges to the vertex.
inDegreeOf(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Returns the in-degree of the specified vertex, which is the number of incoming edges to the vertex.
isDirected(Graph) - Static method in class algatorgraph.GraphConverter
Determines whether a JGraphT graph should be converted to directed or undirected format.

J

JGraphTToD(Graph) - Static method in class algatorgraph.GraphConverter
Converts a JGraphT graph to a DGraph with Double weights (convenience method).
JGraphTToD(Graph, Class<W>) - Static method in class algatorgraph.GraphConverter
Converts a JGraphT graph (directed or undirected) to a DGraph with generic weight type.
JGraphTToU(Graph) - Static method in class algatorgraph.GraphConverter
Converts a JGraphT undirected graph to a Graph with Double weights (convenience method).
JGraphTToU(Graph, Class<W>) - Static method in class algatorgraph.GraphConverter
Converts a JGraphT undirected graph to an undirected Graph with generic weight type.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class algatorgraph.GraphCreator
 

O

outDegreeOf(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Returns the out-degree of the specified vertex, which is the number of outgoing edges from the vertex.
outDegreeOf(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Returns the out-degree of the specified vertex, which is the number of outgoing edges from the vertex.
outgoingEdgesOf(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Returns the set of edges outgoing from the specified vertex.
outgoingEdgesOf(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Returns the set of edges outgoing from the specified vertex.

P

parseG6(File) - Static method in class algatorgraph.GraphCreator
Parses a .g6 or .s6 format file (graph6/sparse6 format) and creates a graph.

R

removeAllEdges(Collection<? extends DEdge<V, W>>) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Removes all specified edges from the graph.
removeAllEdges(Collection<? extends Edge<V, W>>) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Removes all specified edges from the graph.
removeAllEdges(V, V) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Removes all edges connecting the specified source and target vertices.
removeAllEdges(V, V) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Removes all edges connecting the specified vertices.
removeAllVertices(Collection<? extends V>) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Removes all specified vertices and their incident edges from the graph.
removeAllVertices(Collection<? extends V>) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Removes all specified vertices and their incident edges from the graph.
removeEdge(DEdge<V, W>) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Removes the specified edge from the graph.
removeEdge(Edge<V, W>) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Removes the specified edge from the graph.
removeEdge(V, V) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Removes the edge connecting the specified source and target vertices.
removeEdge(V, V) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Removes the edge connecting the specified vertices.
removeVertex(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.DGraph
Removes the specified vertex and all its edges from the graph.
removeVertex(V) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
Removes the specified vertex and all its edges from the graph.

setEdgeWeight(Edge<V, W>, W) - Method in class algatorgraph.Graph
